_credits._description: Definitions from my other project https://github.com/JadXV/Nitrogen

completions.label: isrbxactive
completions.documentation: Checks if the Roblox window is currently active/focused

completions.label: getgc
completions.documentation: Returns a table of all garbage collected objects

completions.label: getrawmetatable
completions.documentation: Returns the raw metatable of an object, bypassing __metatable

completions.label: identifyexecutor
completions.documentation: Returns the name of the executor being used

completions.label: fireclickdetector
completions.documentation: Simulates a click on a ClickDetector object

completions.label: readfile
completions.documentation: Reads the contents of a file and returns it as a string

completions.label: writefile
completions.documentation: Writes content to a file, creating it if it doesn't exist

completions.label: appendfile
completions.documentation: Appends content to the end of a file

completions.label: loadfile
completions.documentation: Loads a file and returns it as a function

completions.label: listfiles
completions.documentation: Returns a list of files in the specified directory

completions.label: isfile
completions.documentation: Checks if a file exists at the specified path

completions.label: isfolder
completions.documentation: Checks if a folder exists at the specified path

completions.label: makefolder
completions.documentation: Creates a new folder at the specified path

completions.label: delfolder
completions.documentation: Deletes a folder and all its contents at the specified path

completions.label: delfile
completions.documentation: Deletes a file at the specified path

completions.label: getsenv
completions.documentation: Returns the environment of a LocalScript

completions.label: getcallingscript
completions.documentation: Returns the script that is calling this function

completions.label: getstack
completions.documentation: Gets stack frame information

completions.label: getthreadidentity
completions.documentation: Gets the identity of the current thread

completions.label: setthreadidentity
completions.documentation: Sets the identity of the current thread

completions.label: hookfunction
completions.documentation: Replaces a function with a new one and returns the original function

completions.label: newcclosure
completions.documentation: Creates a new C closure from a Lua function for secure hooking

completions.label: table.insert
completions.documentation: Inserts an element at the end of the table

completions.label: table.remove
completions.documentation: Removes and returns an element from the table

completions.label: table.concat
completions.detail: (table: table, sep?: string, i?: number, j?: number) -> string
completions.documentation: Concatenates table elements into a string

completions.label: table.sort
completions.documentation: Sorts table elements in place

completions.label: table.clear
completions.documentation: Clears all keys and values from the table

completions.label: table.create
completions.documentation: Creates a new table with n elements initialized with value

completions.label: table.find
completions.detail: (table: table, value: any, init?: number) -> number?
completions.documentation: Returns the index of the first occurrence of value in table

completions.label: table.freeze
completions.documentation: Freezes the table, making it read-only

completions.label: table.clone
completions.documentation: Creates a shallow copy of the table

completions.label: math.abs
completions.documentation: Returns the absolute value of x

completions.label: math.ceil
completions.documentation: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to x

completions.label: math.floor
completions.documentation: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to x

completions.label: math.max
completions.documentation: Returns the maximum value among its arguments

completions.label: math.min
completions.documentation: Returns the minimum value among its arguments

completions.label: math.random
completions.documentation: Returns a random number

completions.label: math.randomseed
completions.documentation: Sets the seed for the random generator

completions.label: math.sin
completions.documentation: Returns the sine of x (in radians)

completions.label: math.cos
completions.documentation: Returns the cosine of x (in radians)

completions.label: math.tan
completions.documentation: Returns the tangent of x (in radians)

completions.label: math.rad
completions.documentation: Converts degrees to radians

completions.label: math.deg
completions.documentation: Converts radians to degrees

completions.label: math.sqrt
completions.documentation: Returns the square root of x

completions.label: math.pow
completions.documentation: Returns x raised to the power y

completions.label: math.clamp
completions.detail: (x: number, min: number, max: number) -> number
completions.documentation: Clamps x between min and max

completions.label: math.lerp
completions.detail: (a: number, b: number, t: number) -> number
completions.documentation: Linearly interpolates between a and b by t

completions.label: math.noise
completions.detail: (x: number, y?: number, z?: number) -> number
completions.documentation: Returns Perlin noise value

completions.label: math.sign
completions.documentation: Returns the sign of x (-1, 0, or 1)

completions.label: math.round
completions.documentation: Rounds x to the nearest integer

completions.label: string.len
completions.documentation: Returns the length of the string

completions.label: string.sub
completions.detail: (s: string, i: number, j?: number) -> string
completions.documentation: Returns the substring from position i to j

completions.label: string.upper
completions.documentation: Converts string to uppercase

completions.label: string.lower
completions.documentation: Converts string to lowercase

completions.label: string.find
completions.detail: (s: string, pattern: string, init?: number) -> number, number
completions.documentation: Finds pattern in the string

completions.label: string.match
completions.detail: (s: string, pattern: string, init?: number) -> string
completions.documentation: Matches pattern in the string

completions.label: string.format
completions.documentation: Returns a formatted version of its variable number of arguments

completions.label: string.gsub
completions.detail: (s: string, pattern: string, repl: string|table|function) -> string, number
completions.documentation: Replaces all occurrences of the pattern

completions.label: string.split
completions.documentation: Splits the string by separator (Roblox specific)

completions.label: string.rep
completions.documentation: Returns a string that is n copies of s

completions.label: string.reverse
completions.documentation: Returns the reversed string

completions.label: string.byte
completions.detail: (s: string, i?: number, j?: number) -> number...
completions.documentation: Returns the byte values of characters

completions.label: string.char
completions.documentation: Returns a string from byte values

completions.label: local
completions.documentation: Declares a local variable

completions.label: function
completions.documentation: Declares a function

completions.label: if
completions.documentation: Starts an if statement

completions.label: then
completions.documentation: Used after if condition

completions.label: else
completions.documentation: Alternative branch in if statement

completions.label: elseif
completions.documentation: Additional condition in if statement

completions.label: end
completions.documentation: Ends a block statement

completions.label: for
completions.documentation: Starts a for loop

completions.label: while
completions.documentation: Starts a while loop

completions.label: do
completions.documentation: Starts a do block

completions.label: repeat
completions.documentation: Starts a repeat-until loop

completions.label: until
completions.documentation: Ends a repeat-until loop

completions.label: break
completions.documentation: Exits a loop

completions.label: return
completions.documentation: Returns from a function

completions.label: continue
completions.documentation: Skips to the next iteration of a loop

completions.label: nil
completions.documentation: Represents no value or invalid value

completions.label: true
completions.documentation: Boolean true value

completions.label: false
completions.documentation: Boolean false value

completions.label: self
completions.documentation: Reference to the current object in methods

completions.label: and
completions.documentation: Logical AND operator

completions.label: or
completions.documentation: Logical OR operator

completions.label: not
completions.documentation: Logical NOT operator

completions.label: in
completions.documentation: Iterator operator used in for loops

completions.label: print
completions.documentation: Prints a message to the output

completions.label: warn
completions.documentation: Prints a warning message to the output

completions.label: wait
completions.documentation: Yields the current thread for the specified duration

completions.label: task.wait
completions.documentation: Yields the current thread for the specified duration (preferred over wait)

completions.label: task.spawn
completions.documentation: Runs a function in a new thread immediately

completions.label: task.defer
completions.documentation: Defers a function to run at the end of the frame

completions.label: task.delay
completions.documentation: Runs a function after a delay

completions.label: task.cancel
completions.documentation: Cancels a scheduled thread

completions.label: pairs
completions.documentation: Returns an iterator for all key-value pairs in a table

completions.label: ipairs
completions.documentation: Returns an iterator for integer-indexed elements in a table

completions.label: type
completions.documentation: Returns the type of a value as a string

completions.label: typeof
completions.documentation: Returns the Roblox type of a value (more specific than type)

completions.label: tostring
completions.documentation: Converts a value to a string

completions.label: tonumber
completions.documentation: Converts a value to a number

completions.label: assert
completions.documentation: Raises an error if value is false or nil

completions.label: error
completions.documentation: Raises an error with the given message

completions.label: pcall
completions.documentation: Protected call - calls function and catches errors

completions.label: xpcall
completions.documentation: Extended protected call with custom error handler

completions.label: select
completions.documentation: Selects elements from variable argument list

completions.label: unpack
completions.documentation: Returns elements from the given table as separate values

completions.label: require
completions.documentation: Loads and returns the specified module

completions.label: spawn
completions.documentation: Runs a function in a new thread (deprecated, use task.spawn)

completions.label: delay
completions.documentation: Runs a function after a delay (deprecated, use task.delay)

completions.label: tick
completions.documentation: Returns time elapsed since epoch

completions.label: time
completions.documentation: Returns time elapsed since the game started

completions.label: setmetatable
completions.documentation: Sets the metatable of a table

completions.label: getmetatable
completions.documentation: Returns the metatable of an object

completions.label: rawset
completions.detail: (table: table, key: any, value: any) -> table
completions.documentation: Sets a value without invoking metamethods

completions.label: rawget
completions.documentation: Gets a value without invoking metamethods

completions.label: rawequal
completions.documentation: Compares two values without invoking metamethods

completions.label: next
completions.documentation: Returns the next key-value pair in a table

completions.label: game
completions.documentation: The root of the Roblox hierarchy

completions.label: workspace
completions.documentation: The Workspace service containing all 3D objects

completions.label: script
completions.documentation: Reference to the current script

completions.label: shared
completions.documentation: A table shared between all scripts

completions.label: _G
completions.documentation: Global environment table

completions.label: GetService
completions.documentation: Gets a Roblox service by name

completions.label: FindFirstChild
completions.documentation: Finds the first child with the given name

completions.label: FindFirstChildOfClass
completions.documentation: Finds the first child of the specified class

completions.label: FindFirstChildWhichIsA
completions.documentation: Finds the first child that is or inherits from the specified class

completions.label: FindFirstAncestor
completions.documentation: Finds the first ancestor with the given name

completions.label: FindFirstAncestorOfClass
completions.documentation: Finds the first ancestor of the specified class

completions.label: WaitForChild
completions.documentation: Waits for a child with the given name to exist

completions.label: GetChildren
completions.documentation: Returns an array of all children

completions.label: GetDescendants
completions.documentation: Returns an array of all descendants

completions.label: IsA
completions.documentation: Returns true if the instance is of the specified class

completions.label: IsDescendantOf
completions.documentation: Returns true if the instance is a descendant of the specified ancestor

completions.label: Clone
completions.documentation: Creates a copy of the instance

completions.label: Destroy
completions.documentation: Destroys the instance and all descendants

completions.label: ClearAllChildren
completions.documentation: Destroys all children of the instance

completions.label: GetPropertyChangedSignal
completions.documentation: Returns a signal that fires when the property changes

completions.label: GetAttribute
completions.documentation: Gets an attribute value

completions.label: SetAttribute
completions.documentation: Sets an attribute value

completions.label: GetAttributes
completions.documentation: Returns all attributes as a table

completions.label: Connect
completions.documentation: Connects a callback function to an event

completions.label: Once
completions.documentation: Connects a callback that only fires once

completions.label: Wait
completions.documentation: Yields until the event fires

completions.label: Disconnect
completions.documentation: Disconnects the connection

completions.label: Instance.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new instance of the specified class

completions.label: Vector3.new
completions.detail: (x?: number, y?: number, z?: number) -> Vector3
completions.documentation: Creates a new Vector3

completions.label: Vector2.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Vector2

completions.label: CFrame.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new CFrame

completions.label: CFrame.Angles
completions.detail: (rx: number, ry: number, rz: number) -> CFrame
completions.documentation: Creates a CFrame from rotation angles

completions.label: CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ
completions.detail: (rx: number, ry: number, rz: number) -> CFrame
completions.documentation: Creates a CFrame from Euler angles

completions.label: CFrame.lookAt
completions.detail: (at: Vector3, lookAt: Vector3, up?: Vector3) -> CFrame
completions.documentation: Creates a CFrame positioned at 'at' looking towards 'lookAt'

completions.label: Color3.new
completions.detail: (r?: number, g?: number, b?: number) -> Color3
completions.documentation: Creates a new Color3 from RGB values (0-1)

completions.label: Color3.fromRGB
completions.detail: (r: number, g: number, b: number) -> Color3
completions.documentation: Creates a Color3 from RGB values (0-255)

completions.label: Color3.fromHSV
completions.detail: (h: number, s: number, v: number) -> Color3
completions.documentation: Creates a Color3 from HSV values

completions.label: Color3.fromHex
completions.documentation: Creates a Color3 from a hex string

completions.label: UDim2.new
completions.detail: (xScale: number, xOffset: number, yScale: number, yOffset: number) -> UDim2
completions.documentation: Creates a new UDim2

completions.label: UDim2.fromScale
completions.documentation: Creates a UDim2 from scale values only

completions.label: UDim2.fromOffset
completions.documentation: Creates a UDim2 from offset values only

completions.label: UDim.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new UDim

completions.label: TweenInfo.new
completions.detail: (time?: number, easingStyle?: EasingStyle, easingDirection?: EasingDirection) -> TweenInfo
completions.documentation: Creates a new TweenInfo object

completions.label: BrickColor.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new BrickColor

completions.label: Ray.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Ray

completions.label: Random.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Random number generator

completions.label: Region3.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Region3

completions.label: Rect.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Rect

completions.label: NumberRange.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new NumberRange

completions.label: NumberSequence.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new NumberSequence

completions.label: ColorSequence.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new ColorSequence

completions.label: RaycastParams.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new RaycastParams object

completions.label: OverlapParams.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new OverlapParams object

completions.label: WalkSpeed
completions.documentation: Controls how fast the Humanoid walks

completions.label: JumpPower
completions.documentation: Controls how high the Humanoid jumps

completions.label: JumpHeight
completions.documentation: Controls the maximum jump height

completions.label: Health
completions.documentation: Current health of the Humanoid

completions.label: MaxHealth
completions.documentation: Maximum health of the Humanoid

completions.label: Parent
completions.documentation: The parent of the instance

completions.label: Name
completions.documentation: The name of the instance

completions.label: ClassName
completions.documentation: The class name of the instance

completions.label: Enabled
completions.documentation: Whether the instance is enabled

completions.label: Visible
completions.documentation: Whether the GUI element is visible

completions.label: Anchored
completions.documentation: Whether the part is affected by physics

completions.label: CanCollide
completions.documentation: Whether the part can collide with other parts

completions.label: Transparency
completions.documentation: The transparency level of the part (0-1)

completions.label: Position
completions.documentation: The position of the part in world space

completions.label: CFrame
completions.documentation: The position and orientation of the part

completions.label: Size
completions.documentation: The size of the part

completions.label: Character
completions.documentation: The character model of the player

completions.label: UserId
completions.documentation: The unique user ID of the player

completions.label: Text
completions.documentation: The text content of a TextLabel/TextButton/TextBox

completions.label: MoveTo
completions.documentation: Makes the Humanoid path to the target position

completions.label: Jump
completions.documentation: Makes the Humanoid jump

completions.label: TakeDamage
completions.documentation: Reduces the Humanoid's health by the specified amount

completions.label: Kick
completions.documentation: Kicks the player from the game

completions.label: GetMouse
completions.documentation: Returns the player's mouse

completions.label: Raycast
completions.detail: (origin: Vector3, direction: Vector3, params?: RaycastParams) -> RaycastResult?
completions.documentation: Casts a ray and returns the result

completions.label: GetPartBoundsInBox
completions.detail: (cframe: CFrame, size: Vector3, params?: OverlapParams) -> Array<Instance>
completions.documentation: Returns parts within a box region

completions.label: GetPartBoundsInRadius
completions.detail: (position: Vector3, radius: number, params?: OverlapParams) -> Array<Instance>
completions.documentation: Returns parts within a spherical region

completions.label: Create
completions.detail: (instance: Instance, tweenInfo: TweenInfo, properties: table) -> Tween
completions.documentation: Creates a new tween for the specified instance

completions.label: Play
completions.documentation: Plays the tween/animation/sound

completions.label: Pause
completions.documentation: Pauses the tween/animation/sound

completions.label: Cancel
completions.documentation: Cancels the tween

completions.label: Stop
completions.documentation: Stops the tween/animation/sound

completions.label: LoadAnimation
completions.documentation: Loads an animation onto the Animator

completions.label: FireServer
completions.documentation: Fires a RemoteEvent to the server

completions.label: InvokeServer
completions.documentation: Invokes a RemoteFunction on the server

completions.label: FireClient
completions.documentation: Fires a RemoteEvent to a specific client

completions.label: FireAllClients
completions.documentation: Fires a RemoteEvent to all clients

completions.label: getgenv
completions.documentation: Returns the global environment table for the exploit

completions.label: getrenv
completions.documentation: Returns the Roblox global environment

completions.label: getreg
completions.documentation: Returns the Lua registry table

completions.label: getinstances
completions.documentation: Returns all instances in the game

completions.label: getnilinstances
completions.documentation: Returns all instances parented to nil

completions.label: getscripts
completions.documentation: Returns all scripts in the game

completions.label: getloadedmodules
completions.documentation: Returns all loaded ModuleScripts

completions.label: getconnections
completions.documentation: Returns all connections to a signal

completions.label: firesignal
completions.documentation: Fires a signal with the provided arguments

completions.label: firetouchinterest
completions.detail: (part: Instance, hitbox: Instance, toggle: number) -> void
completions.documentation: Simulates touch interaction between two parts

completions.label: sethiddenproperty
completions.detail: (instance: Instance, property: string, value: any) -> void
completions.documentation: Sets the value of a hidden property

completions.label: gethiddenproperty
completions.documentation: Gets the value of a hidden property

completions.label: setrawmetatable
completions.documentation: Sets the raw metatable of an object, bypassing protection

completions.label: setreadonly
completions.documentation: Sets whether a table is read-only

completions.label: isreadonly
completions.documentation: Checks if a table is read-only

completions.label: setclipboard
completions.documentation: Copies text to the system clipboard

completions.label: getnamecallmethod
completions.documentation: Gets the current namecall method in a __namecall metatable hook

completions.label: setnamecallmethod
completions.documentation: Sets the namecall method in a __namecall metatable hook

completions.label: cloneref
completions.documentation: Creates a clone reference of an instance

completions.label: compareinstances
completions.documentation: Compares two instances, accounting for cloned references

completions.label: hookmetamethod
completions.detail: (object: any, metamethod: string, hook: function) -> function
completions.documentation: Hooks a metamethod of an object

completions.label: loadstring
completions.documentation: Loads a Lua string as a function

completions.label: request
completions.documentation: Makes an HTTP request

completions.label: http_request
completions.documentation: Alias for request

completions.label: syn.request
completions.documentation: Makes an HTTP request (Synapse X)

completions.label: getupvalue
completions.documentation: Returns the value and name of the i-th upvalue of the function

completions.label: setupvalue
completions.detail: (f: function, i: number, v: any) -> string
completions.documentation: Sets the value of the i-th upvalue of the function

completions.label: getupvalues
completions.documentation: Returns a table of upvalues of the function

completions.label: getconstant
completions.documentation: Returns the i-th constant of the function

completions.label: setconstant
completions.detail: (f: function, i: number, v: any) -> void
completions.documentation: Sets the i-th constant of the function

completions.label: getconstants
completions.documentation: Returns a table of constants of the function

completions.label: Drawing.new
completions.documentation: Creates a new Drawing object. Supported: Line, Circle, Square, Text, Triangle, Image, Quad

completions.label: gethui
completions.documentation: Gets hidden UI container

completions.label: protectgui
completions.documentation: Protects GUI from being destroyed

completions.label: fireproximityprompt
completions.documentation: Triggers a ProximityPrompt

completions.label: keypress
completions.documentation: Simulates a key press event

completions.label: keyrelease
completions.documentation: Simulates a key release event

completions.label: mouse1click
completions.documentation: Simulates a left mouse button click

completions.label: mouse1press
completions.documentation: Simulates pressing down the left mouse button

completions.label: mouse1release
completions.documentation: Simulates releasing the left mouse button

completions.label: mouse2click
completions.documentation: Simulates a right mouse button click

completions.label: mousescroll
completions.documentation: Simulates scrolling the mouse wheel

completions.label: mousemoverel
completions.documentation: Moves the mouse cursor relative to its current position

completions.label: mousemoveabs
completions.documentation: Moves the mouse cursor to the specified screen coordinates

completions.label: saveinstance
completions.documentation: Saves the game instance to file

completions.label: iscclosure
completions.documentation: Returns whether the function is a C closure

completions.label: islclosure
completions.documentation: Returns whether the function is a Lua closure

completions.label: checkcaller
completions.documentation: Returns true if the current function was called by the exploit

completions.label: export type
completions.documentation: Defines and exports a new type alias (Luau)

completions.label: Enum
completions.documentation: Contains all Roblox enumerations

completions.label: Heartbeat
completions.documentation: Fires every frame, after physics simulation

completions.label: RenderStepped
completions.documentation: Fires every frame, before rendering (client only)

completions.label: Stepped
completions.documentation: Fires every frame, before physics simulation

completions.label: PlayerAdded
completions.documentation: Fires when a player joins the game

completions.label: PlayerRemoving
completions.documentation: Fires when a player is leaving the game

completions.label: CharacterAdded
completions.documentation: Fires when a player's character spawns

completions.label: CharacterRemoving
completions.documentation: Fires when a player's character is removed

completions.label: Touched
completions.documentation: Fires when the part touches another part

completions.label: TouchEnded
completions.documentation: Fires when touch ends with another part

completions.label: OnClientEvent
completions.documentation: Fires when the server fires this RemoteEvent to the client

completions.label: OnServerEvent
completions.documentation: Fires when a client fires this RemoteEvent to the server

completions.label: OnClientInvoke
completions.documentation: Called when the server invokes this RemoteFunction

completions.label: OnServerInvoke
completions.documentation: Called when a client invokes this RemoteFunction

completions.label: InputBegan
completions.documentation: Fires when user input begins

completions.label: InputEnded
completions.documentation: Fires when user input ends

completions.label: InputChanged
completions.documentation: Fires when user input changes

completions.label: Players
completions.documentation: Service for managing players

completions.label: Workspace
completions.documentation: Service containing all 3D objects

completions.label: ReplicatedStorage
completions.documentation: Storage replicated to all clients

completions.label: ReplicatedFirst
completions.documentation: Storage replicated to clients before anything else

completions.label: ServerStorage
completions.documentation: Server-only storage

completions.label: ServerScriptService
completions.documentation: Server-only scripts

completions.label: Lighting
completions.documentation: Service for lighting and atmosphere

completions.documentation: GUIs cloned to players on spawn

completions.label: StarterPack
completions.documentation: Tools given to players on spawn

completions.label: StarterPlayer
completions.documentation: Player spawn configuration

completions.documentation: Service for creating tweens

completions.label: UserInputService
completions.documentation: Service for user input handling

completions.label: RunService
completions.documentation: Service for frame-by-frame updates

completions.label: Debris
completions.documentation: Service for automatic cleanup

completions.label: SoundService
completions.documentation: Service for sound settings

completions.documentation: Service for physics settings and collision groups

completions.label: DataStoreService
completions.documentation: Service for persistent data storage

completions.label: MessagingService
completions.documentation: Service for cross-server messaging

completions.label: HttpService
completions.documentation: Service for HTTP requests and JSON encoding

completions.documentation: Service for game passes and products

completions.label: TextService
completions.documentation: Service for text filtering

completions.label: PathfindingService
completions.documentation: Service for NPC pathfinding

completions.label: CollectionService
completions.documentation: Service for tagging instances

completions.label: ContextActionService
completions.documentation: Service for binding actions to inputs

completions.label: GuiService
completions.documentation: Service for GUI management

completions.documentation: Service for simulating input

completions.documentation: Service for proximity prompts

completions.documentation: Service for chat functionality

completions.label: Teams
completions.documentation: Service for team management

completions.documentation: Service for badges

completions.documentation: Service for game localization

completions.documentation: Service for policy information

completions.label: LocalPlayer
completions.documentation: The local player (client only)
